name: Flexpa
description: Flexpa — FHIR-based health insurance API for retrieving member claims and coverage data under CMS interoperability rules.

seo.title: Flexpa — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Flexpa: Flexpa — FHIR-based health insurance API for retrieving member claims and coverage data under CMS interoperability rules.

when_to_use: CMS interoperability-compliant claims data access for payers
FHIR API for member benefit and coverage data retrieval
Prior authorization automation via insurer data connections
Patient-consented health insurance data for fintech lending
Healthcare cost transparency app via claims data feeds

pros: CMS Patient Access API standardized across payers
FHIR output plugs into modern health apps
OAuth flow lets patients authorize their own data pull
Covers claims, coverage, and prescription data types
cons: Payer network still expanding — gaps persist
Latency varies by payer backend quality
review.verdict: The right pick for consumer health apps needing payer data via CMS rules, limited outside that lane.
review.best_for: Consumer health apps building patient-consented claims features
review.not_for: Teams needing provider-side data or non-FHIR integrations

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
